meta.title: Patrick Kabanda - portfolio + case study modals

hero.rolesHtml: Software Engineer•Systems Builder•Solutions Architect
hero.summary: I help fintech, SaaS, and operations-heavy businesses build reliable backend systems that integrate payments, accounting, and internal workflows so they can reduce manual work, avoid costly errors, and scale with confidence.

about.label: About Me
body: I'm a software engineer with a systems-level mindset, someone who thinks carefully about architecture before writing a single line of code. My work sits at the intersection of backend engineering, infrastructure, and business operations.

Having served as CTO at Netpipo Ltd, I understand what it means to make high-stakes technical decisions that affect real users. I've built production systems end-to-end, from database schema to deployment pipelines, and I take pride in shipping software that is reliable, maintainable, and secure.

My experience spans backend development, API integrations with financial systems (UrubutoPay, QuickBooks, IremboPay), process automation, and DevOps. Whether working independently or with distributed teams, I bring rigour and clarity to every engagement.
Based in Kigali, Rwanda, I'm fully equipped for remote collaboration and actively seeking impactful global projects and long-term remote roles.

principles.title: Reliability over speed
principles.text: Architecture-first thinking - systems that don't break at 2am.

principles.title: Integration fluency
principles.text: Payment gateways, accounting APIs, and third-party services are home territory.

principles.title: Global mindset
principles.text: Cross-timezone collaboration with clear, async-first communication.

services.label: Services
services.titleHtml:
Backend systems that keep
operations moving.
services.subtitle: I build and improve the backend systems that keep payments, operations, and internal workflows running reliably.
services.intro: I work with fintech, edtech, SaaS, and operations-heavy businesses that need more than just attractive interfaces. My services are designed for teams that need reliable systems, cleaner integrations, reduced manual work, and stronger operational foundations.

cards.title: Payments & Accounting Integrations
cards.description: Integrate payment gateways, invoicing systems, and accounting platforms into reliable financial workflows that reduce manual reconciliation, prevent duplication, and improve accuracy.

cards.title: Workflow Automation & Internal Tools
cards.description: Turn repetitive, error-prone operations into streamlined workflows through custom dashboards, internal tools, and automation logic.

cards.title: Backend Systems Development
cards.description: Build secure, scalable backend systems that power core business processes, internal operations, and data-driven platforms.

cards.title: API Integrations & Systems Connectivity
cards.description: Connect third-party services and internal platforms through dependable integrations that improve data flow, synchronization, and operational efficiency.

cards.title: Infrastructure & Production Hardening
cards.description: Help systems move beyond development into stable, production-ready environments with better deployment, configuration, and reliability.

cards.title: System Improvement & Stabilization
cards.description: Improve fragile or outdated systems by fixing bugs, cleaning up architecture, strengthening reliability, and preparing them for growth.

cta.text: The best-fit projects for me are usually not just about building features, they are about making critical systems more dependable, more efficient, and better prepared for growth.
cta.button: Need a backend system that works reliably in production? Let's talk.

idealClients.label: Ideal Clients
idealClients.titleHtml:
Dependable backend systems,
for the teams that need them.
idealClients.subtitle: I work best with businesses that need dependable backend systems, not just attractive frontends.
idealClients.intro: My ideal clients are fintech, edtech, SaaS, and operations-heavy businesses with complex workflows, especially those dealing with payments, accounting, internal systems, reconciliation, or manual processes that need automation and reliability.

cards.title: Fintech Startups
cards.description: Best for products and businesses where money movement, transaction accuracy, and system reliability are critical.

cards.title: Edtech Platforms
cards.description: A strong fit for education businesses and platforms that manage student, payment, and administrative workflows.

cards.title: SaaS Companies
cards.description: Ideal for SaaS products that need backend depth, integrations, and stable operational systems beyond surface-level UI.

cards.title: Operations-Heavy Businesses
cards.description: Great for growing businesses with repetitive manual processes, disconnected systems, and back-office inefficiencies.

cta.text: The best-fit clients for me are usually not just at the idea stage. They already have a working process or product, but need stronger systems, better automation, and more reliable operations to scale confidently.
cta.button: Need systems that can actually hold up in production? Let's talk.

projects.label: Projects
projects.subtitle: Click any project to view full case study - architecture, challenges, and outcomes.

education.label: Education
education.subtitle: Formal study and focused programs that shaped my backend, frontend, and systems thinking.

items.title: ProDev Frontend
items.description: Focused frontend training covering modern interface development, component thinking, and user-centered product execution.

items.title: Software Engineering, Backend
items.description: Backend-focused software engineering program centered on problem solving, application architecture, systems design, and production-ready development practices.

items.title: Bachelor's Degree
items.description: University education that strengthened core technical foundations, structured problem solving, and professional discipline for software engineering work.

skills.label: Tech Stack
skills.subtitle: A pragmatic, production-tested toolkit - selected for reliability and depth over breadth.
